parameters.query:
SELECT type, name, description, content
FROM memories
WHERE is_active = true
ORDER BY type, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT session_date, persona, topics, summary, key_decisions
FROM conversations
ORDER BY session_date DESC
LIMIT 7;
